content.en:
Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palace.

Ye Tian came here and came directly to find the Earthquake Sea Realm Lord.

Knowing Ye Tian's strength, the Zhenhai Realm Lord naturally didn't dare to stop Ye Tian and let Ye Tian enter their new headquarters.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, is there anything you need to order?"

The Earthquake Sea Realm Lord looked very humble, he was very afraid of death, otherwise, he would not have taken the high-level people of the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Palace to hide in the crystal barrier space.

If you were bold, you would have already given a chance during the multidimensional tribulation of death.

"I want to know about the Upper Domain, you have obtained hundreds of multidimensional tribulations, you should know something about the Upper Domain, right?" Ye Tian asked.

"Upper Domain!"

The Zhenhai Realm Lord didn't dare to hide it, and revealed: "I don't know much, I only know that there are a total of 3,999 multidimensional territories in the upper domain, of which the nine multidimensional territories in the top nine are occupied by nine forces, these nine forces are truly unimaginable, even the super dimensional realm of the sixth realm can't beat the ordinary members of it." There are many sixth realms in the upper realm, and only by becoming the seventh realm can you have a high enough status, and the strongest one is the ninth realm. "

"In addition, before many multidimensional tribulations, in fact, our side had a connection with the Upper Domain, but then the force in charge of the passage directly and unilaterally cut off the contact, since then, it is extremely difficult for my 407 side to enter the Upper Domain, and only by becoming the Sixth Realm can we hope to enter the Upper Domain. "

Ye Tian asked again: "Have you heard of the power of Shangqing Feather Palace?"

The Zhenhai Realm Lord nodded, "Shangqing Feather Palace is the force that was in charge of the upper and lower domain passages at the beginning, the headquarters of Shangqing Feather Palace is located in the multidimensional territory of No. 3926, it is said that it has three seventh realms, thousands of sixth realms, and as for the fifth realm, there are even more, countless. "

"Shangqing Feather Palace is so powerful!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

Zhenhai Realm Lord said: "Actually, the strength of the Shangqing Feather Palace is nothing in the Upper Domain, the Upper Domain is rich in resources, with resources that are unimaginable on our side, it is not difficult to become the fifth realm or even the sixth realm, but it will be extremely difficult to impact the seventh realm." Therefore, there are many sixth realms in the upper realm, but the number after the seventh realm is much rarer. "

Hearing this, Ye Tian wanted to go to the upper domain even more.

But.

The Upper Domain is so powerful, if he offends a certain Seventh Realm or even the Eighth Realm, no matter how many copies of his body he makes, he will be wiped out by them.

And the Great Realm Armor Technique can only be cultivated to the fifth level, which can prevent (cjff) from the general sixth realm to deduce his traces, which is already the limit.

He wanted to cultivate a better similar secret art, but he couldn't find it for a while.

It's not that he didn't think about creating his own, but it was too difficult.

He also inquired about the origin of the Great Realm Armor Technique, and later found out that it was actually a certain extradimensional creature from the upper domain who fell here, and then gave birth to the Heavenly Armor Clan, leaving behind the Great Realm Armor Technique.

"Maybe only by going to the Upper Domain can you obtain a higher-level secret technique similar to the Great Realm Armor Technique!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian asked more information from the Earthquake Sea Realm Lord, but the Earthquake Sea Realm Lord didn't know much, if he really wanted to know, he still had to go to the Upper Domain.

......

"After comprehending the rules of the eightfold dimension, let's go to the upper domain!"

Ye Tian planned.

In a flash, hundreds of millions of extradimensional epochs have passed.

this day.

Rumble!!!!

The eightfold dimensional rules appeared on Ye Tian's body.

After such a long time, with the help of the Dimensional Rule Arcana, he finally comprehended the eightfold dimensional rules, but there are even more difficult ninefold dimensional rules, even if he has the Dimensional Rule Arcana, it will take a long time for him to realize it.

So, he was going to make a copy of his body go to the Upper Domain.

Eleventh dimension.

Ye Tian tore through the dimensional barrier and entered here.

Under normal circumstances, during the non-multidimensional tribulation, the fifth realm would not be able to enter here, but he had already comprehended the eleventh dimensional soul will, and created the Five Realms Supreme Peerless Sect and the more powerful Five Realms Supreme Peerless Realm, and also comprehended the rules of the eightfold dimension.

Therefore, he could easily tear through the barrier of the eleventh dimension and travel to the eleventh dimension, which was no different from the sixth realm in this respect.

Soon.

He was constantly shuttling in and out of the eleventh dimension, wanting to reach the place where he touched the barrier of the Upper Domain.

It was located in the deepest part of the eleventh dimension, and even Ye Tian had to travel a lot of time.

During this time, he encountered other Sixth Realm multidimensional beings, but he only drove them away, not killed them.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian once again sensed a Sixth Realm multidimensional life, and it was the Sixth Realm multidimensional life that Ye Tian was familiar with, the Void Jinpeng.

And this Void Jinpeng also recognized Ye Tian.

"It's you, strange, aren't you dead?"

Void Jinpeng stopped, his gaze locked on Ye Tian.

"I see, it was your clone who died last time!"

Void Wings understood.

Rumble!!!!

It attacked Ye Tian again, and wanted to capture Ye Tian to continue to explore the inheritance land.

But this time, it will no longer be Ye Tian's opponent.

"Look for death!"

Ye Tian directly cast the Five Realms Supreme Absolute Learning, and with the rules of the Eight Dimensions, how terrifying the strength that erupted.

"Sword Eleven!"

With a sword slash out, the void of the eleventh dimension was sliced open, and the body of the Void Jinpeng was also cut in half, and it was directly hit hard.

The Void Golden Peng forcibly allowed his body to heal and wanted to escape, but was slashed by a sword again.

This time, the vitality and will of the Void Golden Peng were completely wiped out, and it could never be recovered.

After killing the Void Golden Peng, Ye Tian put away its corpse and quickly left.

Soon after.

Ye Tian came to the crystal barrier position of the upper domain, he wanted to break the crystal barrier of the upper domain from here, and then enter the eleventh dimension of the upper domain, he could easily enter the upper domain.

It's also the easiest way to do it.

"Sure enough, the crystal barrier of the eleventh dimension was suppressed by the eleventh dimension, resulting in the crystal barrier here being relatively fragile. "

Ye Tian didn't choose much, he directly attacked the crystal barrier here.

Rumble!!!!

The crystal barrier cracked, forming a gap.

Ye Tian entered the mouth and continued to attack.

The crystal barrier is very tough and thick, and it takes a long time to completely penetrate the entire crystal barrier.

Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian continued to attack, and after a long time, he broke through the crystal barrier in this place and completely entered the eleventh dimension on the opposite side.

Then, he left the eleventh dimension and returned to the reality dimension.

Upper domain.

One of Ye Tian's feet stepped in.
